narrative:
Swancreek East One (precinct in Fulton County) has 844 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points.
